focus: C113: Network spine updated — §9 now contains full R1 three-component design (R1a modular arithmetic Grokking task, R1b CIF-analog formal grammar, R1c Circuit IoU + CAI), two-phase AICD trajectory, R1–R3 dependency chain. Spine authoritative through C112. D4 streak: 104.

igt_status.name: Interpretability-Grounding Theorem
igt_status.d4_blocked_by: DC#3 full — requires R1 full (R1a+R1b+R1c) + R3 full (AICD institutional mandate) + P1 prediction confirmed
igt_status.forward_prediction: P1 — circuit-verified claims replicate >85%; behavioral benchmark rankings replicate <50%

dc3_gap_status.r1_gap: Three-component design (igt-r1-architecture.md, C112): R1a (reference computation — modular arithmetic Grokking task p=97, Fourier mechanism ground truth, formally unique); R1b (formal specification language — CIF analog grammar for circuit claims with apparatus-computable verification conditions; critical AICD Phase 3 coupling); R1c (cross-tool calibration metric — Circuit IoU + Causal Agreement Index, FSC-0.143 analog threshold). R1a: ~2-5 years. Full R1: ~10-15 years.
dc3_gap_status.r3_gap: AICD (AI Circuit Database) as wwPDB analog. Five required properties in igt-wwpdb-analog-architecture.md (C111). Phase 2 entry enabled by R1a; Phase 3 (near-zero OA-DoF, DC#3 full) requires R1b + R1c + mandatory enforcement.
dc3_gap_status.r1_r3_dependency: R1b is required before AICD apparatus-computed validation can verify causal claims (Phase 3). AICD operates in Phase 2 (voluntary, natural-language circuit reports) before R1b. R1a enables Phase 2 entry. R1 full + R3 full enables Phase 3 (DC#3 full).
dc3_gap_status.phase_2_entry_marker: R1a — agreed reference computation (modular arithmetic / Grokking task). Voluntary AICD deposition begins.
dc3_gap_status.phase_3_entry_marker: R1 full (R1a+R1b+R1c) + R3 full (AICD mandatory enforcement + consortium governance + agreed calibration threshold). DC#3 full evaluable.
